agenticchat: CSV export for conversations with timestamps and response times
ai: Watermark — agent state provenance fingerprinting (4 strategies)
VoronoiMap: Self-contained HTML analysis report with stats, heatmap, histograms, and region table (--report flag)
sauravcode: AST visualizer tool (sauravast.py) — pretty tree, JSON, Graphviz DOT, and statistics modes
BioBots: Interactive Cost Estimator — material, machine, energy, consumable, labor breakdown with donut chart and batch scaling
GraphVisual: Ego Network search panel — search by node ID, highlights 1-hop neighborhood, shows degree/type breakdown/neighbor list
agentlens: Session bookmarks — star/unstar sessions, filter by bookmarks, bookmark notes, cascade delete
everything: Achievement System — 40 badges, 12 categories, 5 tiers, level system, progress tracking
gif-captcha: Event Emitter — lightweight pub/sub for CAPTCHA lifecycle hooks (on/once/off/emit/pipe/wildcard)
Vidly: Parental Controls — MPAA ratings, content advisories, per-customer profiles, PIN override, family filtering
FeedReader: Reading Mood Tracker — mood logging, feed impact analysis, mood-based suggestions, patterns, export
Reading Speed Tracker — personalized WPM, length-adjusted estimates, trend analysis, feed/category breakdowns, population percentile
